title: Supreme Court grants singer Neha Singh Rathore anticipatory bail in case over tweets on PM Modi
description: The Supreme Court on Tuesday granted anticipatory bail to Bhojpuri singer and activist Neha Singh Rathore, booked in a criminal case for her social media posts on Prime Minister Narendra Modi, the Bihar elections and Hindu-Muslim politics [Neha Singh Rathore @ Neha Kumari Versus State of Uttar Pradesh and Ors.]A bench of Justices JK Maheshwari and AS Chandurkar made absolute the interim protection earlier granted to Rathore.
